fields.name: campaign_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the marketing campaign

fields.name: department_from
fields.description: Originating department that created the campaign

fields.name: department_to
fields.description: Receiving department responsible for campaign execution and customer support

fields.name: campaign_type
fields.description: Product or service category being promoted

fields.name: target_segment
fields.description: Demographic and behavioural criteria defining the campaign's target audience

children.name: account_type
children.description: Banking segment classification of target customers

children.name: income_level
children.description: Income bracket classification of target customers

children.name: geographical_region
children.description: Array of country or regional codes where the campaign will be promoted

fields.name: campaign_objectives
fields.description: Array of business goals the campaign aims to achieve

fields.name: budget
fields.description: Campaign financial allocation and channel distribution

children.name: currency
children.description: ISO 4217 currency code for all budget amounts

children.name: total_amount
children.description: Total campaign budget in the specified currency

children.name: email
children.description: Budget allocated to email marketing channel

children.name: social_media
children.description: Budget allocated to social media marketing channel

children.name: digital_ads
children.description: Budget allocated to digital advertising channel

children.name: in_app_notifications
children.description: Budget allocated to in-app notification channel

fields.name: key_messages
fields.description: Array of core marketing messages to communicate to customers

fields.name: customer_service_requirements
fields.description: Operational requirements for Customer Services to support the campaign

children.name: expected_inquiry_volume
children.description: Projected number of customer inquiries during the campaign period

children.name: support_languages
children.description: Array of languages in which customer support must be provided

children.name: priority_topics
children.description: Array of primary customer inquiry topics expected during the campaign

children.name: escalation_threshold
children.description: Category of issues requiring escalation beyond standard support

children.name: training_deadline
children.description: Deadline by which Customer Services staff must complete campaign training

fields.name: success_metrics
fields.description: Key performance indicators and targets for campaign success measurement

children.name: target_conversions
children.description: Target number of customers to convert to the promoted product

children.name: target_engagement_rate
children.description: Target proportion of reached customers who engage with the campaign (0–1 scale)

fields.name: created_date
fields.description: Date on which the campaign details were created

fields.name: created_by
fields.description: Email address of the user who created the campaign

fields.name: version
fields.description: Version identifier for the campaign details document
